description_long: This lamp features an ornate, sculptural design with a central translucent or opalescent panel framed by a dark, intricately detailed structure. The upper section is adorned with two stylized animal or dragon heads facing outward, adding a dramatic and decorative flair. The body of the lamp is curvaceous, with layered embellishments that evoke a sense of classical or gothic revival style. The base is circular and solid, providing stability and a visual anchor for the elaborate upper portion. The lamp's surface alternates between glossy, reflective areas and matte, textured details, enhancing its visual complexity. The overall impression is of a decorative, statement lighting piece suitable for upscale urban environments or historical settings.
description: An ornate lamp with a translucent central panel, flanked by stylized animal heads and intricate dark detailing, set on a solid circular base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full ornate design, with both animal heads and the central translucent panel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the lamp's slim profile and the thickness of the central panel, with minimal decorative detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same ornate features and animal heads, but with less emphasis on the translucent panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the lamp's narrow depth and the layered structure of the frame.
